name: lab-trend-side-by-side
description: Two-lab side-by-side trend for George Achterberg (CKD-3 + T2DM). Agent should pull both A1C and eGFR series and render them in a single table with interpretation, plus a one-sentence reading that respects the renal context.
input_message: Show me George Achterberg's last 3 A1Cs and eGFRs side by side with the trend
expected_behavior: Resolves George Achterberg -> PAT-100006. Calls epic_list_observations twice (once per code) with limit ~5. Renders both series newest-first in side-by-side or paired tables, each value with its unit and interpretation. Reading paragraph notes the CKD-3 + T2DM context and the metformin / SGLT-2 considerations from clinical-guidelines-reference §2.3 / §4.2 if applicable. Quotes values verbatim — no rounding, no fabrication.
